name: Marketo
shortDescription: Connect your flows to Adobe Marketo Engage: sync and look up leads, manage static-list membership, run and schedule smart campaigns, read the lead activity stream, work with custom object and CRM records, manage marketing assets (programs, emails, forms, landing pages, smart lists, snippets, folders, and My-Tokens), and run bulk import/export jobs. Authenticates with your Marketo REST credentials (Client ID, Client Secret, and instance Base URL, e.g. `https://123-ABC-456.mktorest.com`); the bearer token is fetched and refreshed automatically. Some action groups require subscription add-ons: the Asset API actions need a Marketing-Activities/Asset entitlement, and the CRM-object actions require CRM-sync (Named Accounts additionally needs the ABM add-on).

actions.name: Sync Leads
actions.description: Creates or updates lead (person) records in bulk. Each record is a free-form object of Marketo field API names (e.g. email, firstName, company). Use this to push contacts into Marketo; choose Create or Update to upsert on the lookup field. Up to 300 records per call.

actions.name: Get Lead by ID
actions.description: Retrieves a single lead (person) by its Marketo ID. Use it after Get Leads or Sync Leads to fetch the full record. Optionally restrict the returned fields.

actions.name: Get Leads
actions.description: Searches leads by a filter field and a list of values (e.g. all leads matching a set of emails or IDs). Use this to find leads before acting on them. For date-window lookups ("leads changed since T"), use the On New Lead trigger, Get Lead Field Changes, or Bulk Lead Export - timestamp ranges are not a valid Get Leads filter. Returns up to 300 per page with a Next Page Token for paging.

actions.name: Delete Leads
actions.description: Permanently deletes leads by their Marketo IDs (up to 300). Skipped rows return a per-row reason. Use Get Leads to find the IDs first.

actions.name: Describe Lead Fields
actions.description: Returns the full schema of lead fields in this instance - each field's API name, display name, and data type. Use it to discover the exact field names to put in Sync Leads or the Fields parameter of Get Lead.

actions.name: Get Lists
actions.description: Returns static lists in the instance, optionally filtered by name or program. Use this to find a list before adding or removing members. Returns up to 300 per page.

actions.name: Get List by ID
actions.description: Retrieves a single static list by ID, including its name, description, and parent program. The List field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: Get Leads by List
actions.description: Returns the lead members of a static list. Use it to read who is on a list before removing or processing them. Returns up to 300 per page with a Next Page Token for paging.

actions.name: Add Leads to List
actions.description: Adds existing leads to a static list (up to 300). Lead IDs are sent as repeated id query parameters per the Marketo membership API. Skipped rows return a per-row reason.

actions.name: Remove Leads from List
actions.description: Removes leads from a static list (up to 300). Lead IDs are sent as repeated id query parameters. Skipped rows return a per-row reason.

actions.name: Member of List
actions.description: Checks whether each given lead is a member of a static list (up to 300). Returns memberof / notmemberof / skipped per lead. Use it to branch a flow on list membership.

actions.name: Get Campaigns
actions.description: Returns smart campaigns in the instance, optionally filtered by name, program, or whether they are triggerable via the API. Use it to find a campaign before requesting or scheduling it.

actions.name: Get Campaign by ID
actions.description: Retrieves a single smart campaign by ID, including its type (trigger or batch) and parent program. The Campaign field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: Request Campaign
actions.description: Runs the given leads through a trigger smart campaign immediately. The campaign must have an active "Campaign is Requested: Source = Web Service API" trigger step. Up to 100 leads per call; My-Token overrides must already exist under the program's My Tokens tab.

actions.name: Schedule Campaign
actions.description: Schedules a batch smart campaign to run at a future time (default: 5 minutes from now; must be at least 5 minutes out). Optionally clones the parent program and applies My-Token overrides. The target must be a batch (not trigger) campaign.

actions.name: Get Activity Types
actions.description: Returns the activity types available in this instance, each with its ID, name, and attributes. Use it to discover the activity type IDs needed for Get Lead Activities.

actions.name: Get Paging Token
actions.description: Returns a paging token that anchors an activity stream at a given start time. Pass the token to Get Lead Activities to begin reading activities from that point.

actions.name: Get Lead Activities
actions.description: Returns lead activities of the chosen type(s) from a paging token (get the first token from Get Paging Token). Use it to read the activity log stream - form fills, clicks, etc. Optionally scope to specific leads or a list.

actions.name: List Custom Object Types
actions.description: Returns the custom object types defined in this instance, each with its API name, dedupe fields, and ID field. Use it to discover the API name needed for Query/Sync/Describe Custom Object. Requires a subscription that includes Custom Objects.

actions.name: Describe Custom Object
actions.description: Returns the schema of a custom object type - its fields, ID field, and dedupe fields. Use it to discover the exact field names to put in Sync/Query Custom Object. The Custom Object field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: Query Custom Objects
actions.description: Searches records of a custom object type by a filter field and values. Use Describe Custom Object to learn the filterable field names. Returns up to 300 per page with a Next Page Token for paging.

actions.name: Sync Custom Objects
actions.description: Creates or updates custom object records in bulk (up to 300). Each record is a free-form object of the object type's field API names (discover them via Describe Custom Object). Choose Create or Update to upsert on the dedupe fields.

actions.name: Delete Custom Objects
actions.description: Deletes custom object records in bulk (up to 300). Each record identifies a row by its dedupe field(s) or marketoGUID per the Delete By setting. Skipped rows return a per-row reason.

actions.name: Browse Programs
actions.description: Returns programs from the instance with offset paging. Use it to find a program before reading, cloning, or approving it.

actions.name: Get Program by ID
actions.description: Retrieves a single program by ID. The Program field is a dropdown backed by a dictionary.

actions.name: Create Program
actions.description: Creates a new program in the chosen folder. The name must be unique within the folder.

actions.name: Update Program
actions.description: Updates a program's name and/or description.

actions.name: Clone Program
actions.description: Clones a program into a destination folder under a new globally-unique name. Programs with Push/In-App/Reports/Social assets cannot be cloned.

actions.name: Delete Program
actions.description: Permanently deletes a program.

actions.name: Approve Email Program
actions.description: Approve an Email program for send. Requires start/end dates plus a valid approved email and smart list (set in Marketo).

actions.name: Unapprove Email Program
actions.description: Unapprove a previously-approved Email program.

actions.name: Browse Folders
actions.description: Returns folders under a root folder, traversing to a chosen depth. Use it to navigate the asset tree.

actions.name: Get Folder by ID
actions.description: Retrieves a single folder by ID.

actions.name: Create Folder
actions.description: Creates a new folder under a parent folder.

actions.name: Update Folder
actions.description: Updates a folder's name, description, or archive state.

actions.name: Delete Folder
actions.description: Deletes an (empty) folder. Programs and system folders cannot be deleted.

actions.name: Get Tokens by Folder
actions.description: Lists the My-Tokens defined on a folder or program.

actions.name: Create Token
actions.description: Adds a My-Token to a folder or program.

actions.name: Delete Token
actions.description: Deletes a My-Token from a folder or program.

actions.name: Browse Emails
actions.description: Returns email assets with offset paging, optionally filtered by status or folder.

actions.name: Get Email by ID
actions.description: Retrieves a single email asset by ID.

actions.name: Get Email Content
actions.description: Retrieves the content sections of an email asset.

actions.name: Create Email
actions.description: Creates a new email asset from an email template in the chosen folder.

actions.name: Update Email
actions.description: Updates an email asset's name and/or description.

actions.name: Clone Email
actions.description: Clones an email asset into a destination folder under a new name.

actions.name: Delete Email
actions.description: Permanently deletes an email asset.

actions.name: Approve Email
actions.description: Approve the email draft for send. Requires from-name, from-email, reply-to, and subject to be set.

actions.name: Unapprove Email
actions.description: Unapprove a previously-approved email asset.

actions.name: Send Sample Email
actions.description: Sends a sample of an email asset to a recipient, optionally rendered as a specific lead.

actions.name: Browse Forms
actions.description: Returns form assets with offset paging, optionally filtered by status.

actions.name: Get Form by ID
actions.description: Retrieves a single form asset by ID.

actions.name: Get Form Fields
actions.description: Lists the fields on a form asset.

actions.name: Create Form
actions.description: Creates a new form asset in the chosen folder.

actions.name: Update Form
actions.description: Updates a form asset's metadata.

actions.name: Clone Form
actions.description: Clones a form asset into a destination folder under a new name.

actions.name: Approve Form
actions.description: Approves a form asset.

actions.name: Unapprove Form
actions.description: Unapproves a form asset.

actions.name: Delete Form
actions.description: Deletes a form asset. The form must be unapproved first.

actions.name: Browse Landing Pages
actions.description: Returns landing page assets with offset paging, optionally filtered by status or folder.

actions.name: Get Landing Page by ID
actions.description: Retrieves a single landing page asset by ID.

actions.name: Get Landing Page Content
actions.description: Retrieves the content sections of a landing page asset.

actions.name: Create Landing Page
actions.description: Creates a new landing page asset from an LP template in the chosen folder.

actions.name: Update Landing Page
actions.description: Updates a landing page asset's metadata.

actions.name: Clone Landing Page
actions.description: Clones a landing page asset into a destination folder under a new name.

actions.name: Approve Landing Page
actions.description: Approves a landing page asset.

actions.name: Unapprove Landing Page
actions.description: Unapproves a landing page asset.

actions.name: Delete Landing Page
actions.description: Deletes a landing page asset. The page must be unapproved and unreferenced.

actions.name: Browse Smart Lists
actions.description: Returns user-created smart list assets in a folder (built-in/system smart lists are not supported by this API).

actions.name: Get Smart List by ID
actions.description: Retrieves a single smart list asset by ID, optionally including its rule definitions.

actions.name: Clone Smart List
actions.description: Clones a smart list asset into a destination folder under a new name.

actions.name: Delete Smart List
actions.description: Deletes a user-created smart list asset.

actions.name: Get Snippet by ID
actions.description: Retrieves a single snippet asset by ID (no browse-list endpoint; supply the id).

actions.name: Get Snippet Content
actions.description: Retrieves the content of a snippet asset.

actions.name: Create Snippet
actions.description: Creates a new snippet asset in the chosen folder.

actions.name: Update Snippet
actions.description: Updates a snippet asset's metadata.

actions.name: Update Snippet Content
actions.description: Sets the HTML content of a snippet asset.

actions.name: Approve Snippet Draft
actions.description: Approves the draft of a snippet asset.

actions.name: Delete Snippet
actions.description: Deletes a snippet asset.

actions.name: Describe Opportunity
actions.description: Returns the Opportunity object schema - its fields, idField, and dedupe fields. Requires a CRM-sync-enabled subscription.

actions.name: Query Opportunities
actions.description: Searches Opportunity records by a searchable field and values. Returns up to 300 per page with a Next Page Token.

actions.name: Sync Opportunities
actions.description: Creates or updates Opportunity records in bulk (up to 300). externalOpportunityId is required for create; name must not be null.

actions.name: Delete Opportunities
actions.description: Deletes Opportunity records in bulk (up to 300) by dedupe field(s) or marketoGUID.

actions.name: Describe Opportunity Role
actions.description: Returns the Opportunity Role object schema. Requires a CRM-sync-enabled subscription.

actions.name: Query Opportunity Roles
actions.description: Searches Opportunity Role records by a searchable field and values.

actions.name: Sync Opportunity Roles
actions.description: Creates or updates Opportunity Role records (up to 300). Dedupes on the composite { externalOpportunityId, leadId, role }.

actions.name: Delete Opportunity Roles
actions.description: Deletes Opportunity Role records (up to 300) by dedupe field(s) or marketoGUID.

actions.name: Describe Company
actions.description: Returns the Company object schema. Requires a CRM-sync-enabled subscription.

actions.name: Query Companies
actions.description: Searches Company records by a searchable field and values.

actions.name: Sync Companies
actions.description: Creates or updates Company records in bulk (up to 300). Dedupes on externalCompanyId.

actions.name: Delete Companies
actions.description: Deletes Company records in bulk (up to 300) by dedupe field(s) or marketoGUID.

actions.name: Describe Sales Person
actions.description: Returns the Sales Person object schema. Requires a CRM-sync-enabled subscription.

actions.name: Query Sales Persons
actions.description: Searches Sales Person records by a searchable field and values.

actions.name: Sync Sales Persons
actions.description: Creates or updates Sales Person records in bulk (up to 300). Dedupes on externalSalesPersonId.

actions.name: Delete Sales Persons
actions.description: Deletes Sales Person records in bulk (up to 300) by dedupe field(s) or marketoGUID.

actions.name: Describe Named Account
actions.description: Returns the Named Account object schema. Requires the Marketo ABM / Account-Based add-on.

actions.name: Query Named Accounts
actions.description: Searches Named Account records by a searchable field and values. Requires the ABM add-on.

actions.name: Sync Named Accounts
actions.description: Creates or updates Named Account records in bulk (up to 300). Dedupes on name. Requires the ABM add-on.

actions.name: Delete Named Accounts
actions.description: Deletes Named Account records in bulk (up to 300) by name or marketoGUID. Requires the ABM add-on.

actions.name: Merge Leads
actions.description: Merges up to 25 losing leads into a winning lead, then permanently destroys the losing records. IRREVERSIBLE.

actions.name: Push Lead
actions.description: Pushes lead records into a program, logging a "Push Lead to Marketo" activity. Up to 300 records.

actions.name: Submit Form
actions.description: Submits data to a Marketo form on behalf of a lead, triggering the form's fill-out flows just like a real submission.

actions.name: Associate Lead
actions.description: Associates an anonymous web session (via its Munchkin cookie) with a known Marketo lead.

actions.name: Import Leads
actions.description: Imports a lead file (CSV/TSV) into Marketo asynchronously. The first row must be a header of Marketo field API names; the file must be under 10MB. Returns a batch id to poll for status.

actions.name: Get Import Lead Status
actions.description: Returns the status of a lead-import batch (Queued / Importing / Complete / Failed) with row counts.

actions.name: Get Import Lead Failures
actions.description: Returns the failed rows of a lead-import batch as raw CSV (with a reason column).

actions.name: Get Import Lead Warnings
actions.description: Returns the warning rows of a lead-import batch as raw CSV (with a reason column).

actions.name: Create Lead Export
actions.description: Creates a bulk lead export job (does not start it - use Enqueue Lead Export). Define the columns and an optional date window or static list. Limits: 500MB/day, 2 concurrent + 10 queued.

actions.name: Enqueue Lead Export
actions.description: Starts (enqueues) a created lead export job so Marketo begins processing it.

actions.name: Get Lead Export Status
actions.description: Returns the status of a lead export job (Created / Queued / Processing / Completed / Failed / Canceled).

actions.name: Get Lead Export File
actions.description: Returns the exported lead file as raw delimited text. Only valid once the job status is Completed.

actions.name: Cancel Lead Export
actions.description: Cancels a queued or processing lead export job.

actions.name: Create Activity Export
actions.description: Creates a bulk activity export job (does not start it - use Enqueue Activity Export). Requires a createdAt date window (31-day max).

actions.name: Enqueue Activity Export
actions.description: Starts (enqueues) a created activity export job.

actions.name: Get Activity Export Status
actions.description: Returns the status of an activity export job.

actions.name: Get Activity Export File
actions.description: Returns the exported activity file as raw delimited text. Only valid once the job status is Completed.

actions.name: Cancel Activity Export
actions.description: Cancels a queued or processing activity export job.

idealUseCases: Push new contacts from forms, CRMs, or spreadsheets into Marketo as leads (create or update)
Add or remove leads from static lists to drive nurture and segmentation
Trigger or schedule a smart campaign for a set of leads, with optional My-Token overrides
Read lead activities (form fills, clicks, opens) into a flow for routing or reporting
Create, query, or delete custom object and CRM records (opportunities, companies, sales persons, named accounts)
Author and manage marketing assets: clone programs, emails, forms, and landing pages, manage folders, My-Tokens, smart lists, and snippets, and approve/unapprove for go-live
Merge duplicate leads, push leads into a program, submit a form on a lead's behalf, or associate an anonymous web session with a known lead
Bulk-import a lead file and poll its status, or bulk-export leads/activities and pull the resulting file
Fire a flow automatically when a lead is created, an activity occurs, a watched field changes, or a lead is deleted
agentIdeas: When a Marketo **"On New Lead"** trigger fires, use Slack **"Send Message To Channel"** to alert your sales team and add the lead to a follow-up list with Google Sheets **"Add Row"**.
Use Google Sheets **"Get Rows"** to read a list of event registrants, then call Marketo **"Sync Leads"** and **"Add Leads to List"** to load them into a nurture program.

When a Marketo **"On Lead Field Change"** trigger fires on a lead-score field, call Marketo **"Request Campaign"** to run a smart campaign, then post to Slack **"Send Message To Channel"** for the account owner.
On a new Salesforce or HubSpot deal, use Marketo **"Sync Opportunities"** and **"Sync Companies"** to keep CRM-object records aligned for account-based scoring.
